passage_title: Back to the future of skyscraper design

sentences.sentence: The Recovery of Natural Environments in Architecture by Professor Alan Short is the culmination of 30 years of research and award-winning green building design by Short and colleagues in Architecture, Engineering, Applied Maths and Earth Sciences at the University of Cambridge.
sentences.translation: Alan Short 教授所著的《建筑中的自然环境恢复》是 Short 及其剑桥大学建筑、工程、应用数学和地球科学领域同事 30 年研究与获奖绿色建筑设计的集大成之作。

structure.text: The Recovery of Natural Environments in Architecture by Professor Alan Short
is the culmination of 30 years of research and award-winning green building design
by Short and colleagues in Architecture, Engineering, Applied Maths and Earth Sciences at the University of Cambridge

difficult_points: 长主语是书名加 by Professor Alan Short，真正谓语从 is 开始。
the culmination of 表示多年研究和设计成果的最终汇聚。
by Short and colleagues 修饰 research and design，说明这些成果由谁完成。

sentences.sentence: 'The crisis in building design is already here,' said Short.
sentences.translation: Short 说：“建筑设计危机已经到来了。”

structure.text: The crisis in building design is already here
said Short

difficult_points: 引号中的内容是被转述的话，said Short 是后置转述语。
already here 强调危机不是未来风险，而是已经发生的现实。

sentences.sentence: 'Policy makers think you can solve energy and building problems with gadgets.
sentences.translation: “政策制定者认为，人们可以靠小装置解决能源和建筑问题。

structure.text: Policy makers
think
you can solve energy and building problems with gadgets
with gadgets

difficult_points: think 后省略 that，引导宾语从句。
you 是泛指用法，指“人们”或“我们”。
with gadgets 表示手段，指依靠技术小装置。

sentences.sentence: You can't.
sentences.translation: 但你不能。

structure.text: You
can't

difficult_points: can't 省略了前一句的 solve energy and building problems with gadgets。
短句单独成句，形成强调和反驳。

sentences.sentence: As global temperatures continue to rise, we are going to continue to squander more and more energy on keeping our buildings mechanically cool until we have run out of capacity.'
sentences.translation: 随着全球气温持续上升，我们会继续把越来越多的能源浪费在用机械方式为建筑降温上，直到能力耗尽。”

structure.text: As global temperatures continue to rise
we
are going to continue to squander more and more energy
on keeping our buildings mechanically cool
until we have run out of capacity

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示“随着”。
are going to continue to squander 表示对未来趋势的判断，语气很强。
on keeping ... cool 说明能源被浪费在什么事情上。
until 引导时间从句，说明这种消耗会持续到能力耗尽。

sentences.sentence: Short is calling for a sweeping reinvention of how skyscrapers and major public buildings are designed - to end the reliance on sealed buildings which exist solely via the 'life support' system of vast air conditioning units.
sentences.translation: Short 呼吁彻底重新发明摩天楼和大型公共建筑的设计方式，以结束对密闭建筑的依赖；这些建筑完全依靠庞大空调设备构成的“生命维持”系统而存在。

structure.text: Short
is calling for a sweeping reinvention
of how skyscrapers and major public buildings are designed
to end the reliance on sealed buildings
which exist solely via the 'life support' system of vast air conditioning units

difficult_points: is calling for 表示正在倡议或呼吁某种改变。
how ... are designed 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 of 的宾语。
破折号后的 to end ... 说明这种重新发明的目的。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 sealed buildings。

sentences.sentence: Instead, he shows it is entirely possible to accommodate natural ventilation and cooling in large buildings by looking into the past, before the widespread introduction of air conditioning systems, which were 'relentlessly and aggressively marketed' by their inventors.
sentences.translation: 相反，他表明，通过回望空调系统广泛引入之前的过去，在大型建筑中容纳自然通风和降温是完全可能的；这些空调系统曾被发明者“持续而强势地推销”。

structure.text: Instead
he shows
it is entirely possible to accommodate natural ventilation and cooling in large buildings
by looking into the past
which were 'relentlessly and aggressively marketed' by their inventors

difficult_points: Instead 表示与依赖空调的思路相反。
it is entirely possible to ... 中 it 是形式主语，真正内容是不定式。
by looking into the past 表示实现这一可能性的方式。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 air conditioning systems。

sentences.sentence: Short points out that to make most contemporary buildings habitable, they have to be sealed and air conditioned.
sentences.translation: Short 指出，为了让大多数当代建筑适合居住或使用，它们必须被密封并装上空调。

structure.text: Short points out
that to make most contemporary buildings habitable, they have to be sealed and air conditioned
to make most contemporary buildings habitable
they have to be sealed and air conditioned

difficult_points: that 引导 points out 的宾语从句。
to make ... habitable 是目的状语，habitable 作宾语补足语。
have to be sealed and air conditioned 使用被动语态，说明建筑必须被处理成密闭和空调化。

sentences.sentence: The energy use and carbon emissions this generates is spectacular and largely unnecessary.
sentences.translation: 由此产生的能源使用和碳排放非常惊人，而且在很大程度上并无必要。

structure.text: The energy use and carbon emissions this generates
this generates
is spectacular and largely unnecessary

difficult_points: this generates 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 energy use and carbon emissions。
this 指上一句的密闭和空调化做法。
is 使用单数谓语，整体把 energy use and carbon emissions 看作一个总体现象。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在很大程度上没有必要

sentences.sentence: Buildings in the West account for 40-50% of electricity usage, generating substantial carbon emissions, and the rest of the world is catching up at a frightening rate.
sentences.translation: 西方建筑占用电量的 40% 到 50%，产生大量碳排放，而世界其他地区正以惊人的速度追赶上来。

structure.text: Buildings in the West
account for 40-50% of electricity usage
generating substantial carbon emissions
and the rest of the world is catching up at a frightening rate

difficult_points: account for 表示占某一比例，是数据类表达的核心。
generating ... 是现在分词短语，说明电力使用造成的结果。
the rest of the world is catching up 表示其他地区的建筑能耗正在接近西方水平。

sentences.sentence: Short regards glass, steel and air-conditioned skyscrapers as symbols of status, rather than practical ways of meeting our requirements.
sentences.translation: Short 认为玻璃、钢铁和空调化摩天楼是地位的象征，而不是满足我们需求的实用方式。

structure.text: Short
regards glass, steel and air-conditioned skyscrapers as symbols of status
rather than practical ways of meeting our requirements
of meeting our requirements

difficult_points: regard ... as ... 表示“把……看作……”。
rather than 引出对比，否定这些建筑的实用价值。
of meeting our requirements 修饰 ways，说明这些方式本应满足需求。

sentences.sentence: Short's book highlights a developing and sophisticated art and science of ventilating buildings through the 19th and earlier-20th centuries, including the design of ingeniously ventilated hospitals.
sentences.translation: Short 的书重点展示了 19 世纪和 20 世纪早期逐渐发展且相当复杂的建筑通风艺术与科学，其中包括设计巧妙通风的医院。

structure.text: Short's book
highlights a developing and sophisticated art and science of ventilating buildings
through the 19th and earlier-20th centuries
including the design of ingeniously ventilated hospitals

difficult_points: a developing and sophisticated art and science 是复合名词结构，核心是 art and science。
of ventilating buildings 说明这门艺术与科学的对象是建筑通风。
including ... 是补充举例，列出其中一个重要设计领域。

sentences.sentence: Of particular interest were those built to the designs of John Shaw Billings, including the first Johns Hopkins Hospital in the US city of Baltimore (1873-1889).
sentences.translation: 特别令人感兴趣的是那些按照 John Shaw Billings 的设计建造的医院，其中包括美国巴尔的摩市第一座约翰斯·霍普金斯医院（1873—1889）。

structure.text: Of particular interest
were those built to the designs of John Shaw Billings
built to the designs of John Shaw Billings
including the first Johns Hopkins Hospital in the US city of Baltimore (1873-1889)

difficult_points: Of particular interest 置于句首形成倒装，正常语序是 those ... were of particular interest。
those 指上一句中的 hospitals。
built to the designs ... 是过去分词短语，修饰 those。

sentences.sentence: 'We spent three years digitally modelling Billings' final designs,' says Short.
sentences.translation: Short 说：“我们花了三年时间对 Billings 的最终设计进行数字建模。”

structure.text: We spent three years digitally modelling Billings' final designs
spent three years digitally modelling
says Short

difficult_points: spent three years doing 是固定结构，表示花费三年做某事。
digitally modelling 是动名词短语，说明花费时间的具体活动。
says Short 是后置转述语。

sentences.sentence: 'We put pathogens[1] in the airstreams, modelled for someone with tuberculosis (TB) coughing in the wards and we found the ventilation systems in the room would have kept other patients safe from harm.'
sentences.translation: “我们把病原体放入气流中，模拟病房里有人患结核病并咳嗽的情况，结果发现房间里的通风系统本可以保护其他患者免受伤害。”

structure.text: We put pathogens[1] in the airstreams
modelled for someone with tuberculosis (TB) coughing in the wards
and we found
the ventilation systems in the room would have kept other patients safe from harm
would have kept other patients safe from harm

difficult_points: 句中连续列出实验步骤和发现：放入病原体、建模、发现结果。
someone with tuberculosis (TB) coughing in the wards 是模拟对象和行为。
would have kept 表示在模拟条件下本可以做到的结果，带有假设意味。
safe from harm 是宾语补足语，说明 other patients 的状态。

sentences.sentence: 'We discovered that 19th-century hospital wards could generate up to 24 air changes an hour - that's similar to the performance of a modern-day, computer-controlled operating theatre.
sentences.translation: “我们发现，19 世纪的医院病房每小时可产生多达 24 次换气——这与现代计算机控制手术室的性能相近。

structure.text: We discovered
that 19th-century hospital wards could generate up to 24 air changes an hour
that's similar to the performance of a modern-day, computer-controlled operating theatre
up to 24 air changes an hour

difficult_points: that 引导 discovered 的宾语从句，说明研究发现。
up to 表示最高可达，强调换气次数高。
破折号后用 that's similar ... 对 24 次换气的性能进行类比解释。

sentences.sentence: We believe you could build wards based on these principles now.
sentences.translation: 我们认为，现在就可以根据这些原则建造病房。

structure.text: We believe
you could build wards based on these principles now
based on these principles

difficult_points: believe 后省略 that，引导宾语从句。
you 是泛指，表示人们或建筑设计者。
based on these principles 是过去分词短语，修饰 wards。

sentences.sentence: Single rooms are not appropriate for all patients.
sentences.translation: 单人病房并不适合所有患者。

structure.text: Single rooms
are not appropriate for all patients
for all patients

difficult_points: not appropriate for 表示“不适合”，不是简单的“不正确”。
all patients 说明 Short 反对把单人病房当作适用于所有人的方案。
句子为下一句 communal wards 的合理性做铺垫。

sentences.sentence: Communal wards appropriate for certain patients - older people with dementia, for example - would work just as well in today's hospitals, at a fraction of the energy cost.'
sentences.translation: 适合某些患者的公共病房——例如患有痴呆症的老年人——在今天的医院中同样可行，而且能源成本只需一小部分。”

structure.text: Communal wards appropriate for certain patients
older people with dementia, for example
would work just as well in today's hospitals
at a fraction of the energy cost

difficult_points: appropriate for certain patients 是形容词短语，修饰 Communal wards。
破折号中 older people with dementia 是 certain patients 的例子。
would work just as well 表示在今天也能同样有效运作。
at a fraction of the energy cost 强调能耗成本大幅降低。

sentences.sentence: Professor Short contends the mindset and skill-sets behind these designs have been completely lost, lamenting the disappearance of expertly designed theatres, opera houses, and other buildings where up to half the volume of the building was given over to ensuring everyone got fresh air.
sentences.translation: Short 教授认为，这些设计背后的思维方式和技能组合已经完全失传；他为那些专业设计的剧院、歌剧院和其他建筑的消失感到惋惜，在这些建筑中，多达一半的建筑体量都用于确保每个人都能获得新鲜空气。

structure.text: Professor Short contends
the mindset and skill-sets behind these designs have been completely lost
lamenting the disappearance of expertly designed theatres, opera houses, and other buildings
where up to half the volume of the building was given over to ensuring everyone got fresh air
to ensuring everyone got fresh air

difficult_points: contends 后省略 that，引导宾语从句。
have been completely lost 使用现在完成被动语态，强调这些能力已经失传。
lamenting ... 是现在分词短语，补充说明 Short 对这种失传的态度。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 buildings，说明这些建筑如何保证新鲜空气。

sentences.sentence: Much of the ingenuity present in 19th-century hospital and building design was driven by a panicked public clamouring for buildings that could protect against what was thought to be the lethal threat of miasmas - toxic air that spread disease.
sentences.translation: 19 世纪医院和建筑设计中的许多巧思，是由恐慌的公众推动的；他们强烈要求建筑能够抵御当时被认为致命的瘴气威胁——也就是会传播疾病的有毒空气。

structure.text: Much of the ingenuity present in 19th-century hospital and building design
was driven by a panicked public
clamouring for buildings
that could protect against what was thought to be the lethal threat of miasmas
toxic air that spread disease

difficult_points: Much of the ingenuity 是主语，present in ... 修饰 ingenuity。
was driven by 使用被动语态，说明设计巧思背后的推动力量。
clamouring for ... 是现在分词短语，修饰 a panicked public。
破折号后的 toxic air that spread disease 解释 miasmas。

sentences.sentence: Miasmas were feared as the principal agents of disease and epidemics for centuries, and were used to explain the spread of infection from the Middle Ages right through to the cholera outbreaks in London and Paris during the 1850s.
sentences.translation: 几个世纪以来，瘴气被视为疾病和流行病的主要媒介，并被用来解释从中世纪一直到 19 世纪 50 年代伦敦和巴黎霍乱暴发期间的感染传播。

structure.text: Miasmas
were feared as the principal agents of disease and epidemics for centuries
and were used to explain the spread of infection
from the Middle Ages right through to the cholera outbreaks in London and Paris during the 1850s

difficult_points: were feared 和 were used 是并列被动谓语，共同以 Miasmas 为主语。
as the principal agents 表示被视作疾病的主要成因或媒介。
from ... right through to ... 表示时间跨度从中世纪一直延续到 19 世纪 50 年代。

sentences.sentence: Foul air, rather than germs, was believed to be the main driver of 'hospital fever', leading to disease and frequent death.
sentences.translation: 人们认为导致“医院热”的主要因素是污浊空气，而不是细菌；这种病会导致疾病和频繁死亡。

structure.text: Foul air
rather than germs
was believed to be the main driver of 'hospital fever'
leading to disease and frequent death

difficult_points: rather than germs 插入对比，强调当时关注的是空气而非细菌。
was believed to be 使用被动语态，表示当时人们的观念。
leading to ... 是现在分词短语，说明 hospital fever 的后果。

sentences.sentence: The prosperous steered clear of hospitals.
sentences.translation: 富裕阶层会避开医院。

structure.text: The prosperous
steered clear of hospitals

difficult_points: The prosperous 是“the + 形容词”结构，表示一类人：富裕者。
steered clear of 是固定表达，表示主动避开。
这句话说明当时医院被认为危险，连富人也尽量不去。

sentences.sentence: While miasma theory has been long since disproved, Short has for the last 30 years advocated a return to some of the building design principles produced in its wake.
sentences.translation: 虽然瘴气理论早已被证明是错误的，但 Short 在过去 30 年里一直倡导回归一些在其影响下产生的建筑设计原则。

structure.text: While miasma theory has been long since disproved
Short
has for the last 30 years advocated a return
to some of the building design principles produced in its wake
produced in its wake

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，表示“尽管”。
has ... advocated 是现在完成时，for the last 30 years 插入其中表示持续时间。
produced in its wake 是过去分词短语，修饰 principles。
its 指 miasma theory，in its wake 表示在该理论影响之后产生。

sentences.sentence: Today, huge amounts of a building's space and construction cost are given over to air conditioning.
sentences.translation: 如今，建筑的大量空间和建造成本都被用于空调系统。

structure.text: Today
huge amounts of a building's space and construction cost
are given over to air conditioning

difficult_points: huge amounts of 同时修饰 space and construction cost。
are given over to 使用被动语态，表示资源被分配给空调。
Today 与上一段历史背景形成时间对比。

sentences.sentence: 'But I have designed and built a series of buildings over the past three decades which have tried to reinvent some of these ideas and then measure what happens.
sentences.translation: “但在过去三十年里，我设计并建造了一系列建筑，它们试图重新发明其中一些理念，然后测量会发生什么。

structure.text: I
have designed and built a series of buildings over the past three decades
which have tried to reinvent some of these ideas and then measure what happens
what happens

difficult_points: have designed and built 是现在完成时，强调三十年来完成的实践与现在相关。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 buildings。
what happens 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 measure 的宾语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 重新发明其中一些理念

sentences.sentence: 'To go forward into our new low-energy, low-carbon future, we would be well advised to look back at design before our high-energy, high-carbon present appeared.
sentences.translation: “为了走向新的低能耗、低碳未来，我们最好回顾在如今高能耗、高碳现状出现之前的设计。

structure.text: To go forward into our new low-energy, low-carbon future
we
would be well advised to look back at design
before our high-energy, high-carbon present appeared

difficult_points: To go forward ... 是目的状语，说明为什么要回看过去设计。
would be well advised to 是委婉建议，意为“最好应该”。
before 引导时间从句，限定应回顾的设计时期。

sentences.sentence: What is surprising is what a rich legacy we have abandoned.'
sentences.translation: 令人惊讶的是，我们竟然抛弃了如此丰富的遗产。”

structure.text: What is surprising
is
what a rich legacy we have abandoned
we have abandoned

difficult_points: What is surprising 是名词性从句作主语。
what a rich legacy we have abandoned 是感叹式名词性从句，强调遗产之丰富。
have abandoned 使用现在完成时，表示抛弃过去设计遗产的结果影响现在。

sentences.sentence: Successful examples of Short's approach include the Queen's Building at De Montfort University in Leicester.
sentences.translation: Short 方法的成功案例包括莱斯特德蒙福特大学的女王大楼。

structure.text: Successful examples of Short's approach
include the Queen's Building
at De Montfort University in Leicester

difficult_points: Successful examples 是主语，of Short's approach 说明例子的来源。
include 引出具体案例。
at De Montfort University in Leicester 说明 Queen's Building 的地点。

sentences.sentence: Containing as many as 2,000 staff and students, the entire building is naturally ventilated, passively cooled and naturally lit, including the two largest auditoria, each seating more than 150 people.
sentences.translation: 这整栋建筑可容纳多达 2,000 名教职员工和学生，采用自然通风、被动冷却和自然采光，其中包括两个最大的礼堂，每个可容纳 150 多人。

structure.text: Containing as many as 2,000 staff and students
the entire building
is naturally ventilated, passively cooled and naturally lit
including the two largest auditoria
each seating more than 150 people

difficult_points: Containing ... 是现在分词短语，补充说明建筑容量。
naturally ventilated, passively cooled and naturally lit 是三个并列被动描述。
including ... 补充说明自然通风等设计也覆盖礼堂。
each seating ... 是独立结构，说明两个礼堂各自的容量。

sentences.sentence: The award-winning building uses a fraction of the electricity of comparable buildings in the UK.
sentences.translation: 这座获奖建筑的用电量只是英国同类建筑的一小部分。

structure.text: The award-winning building
uses a fraction of the electricity
of comparable buildings in the UK

difficult_points: a fraction of 表示只占很小一部分，强调节能效果。
comparable buildings 指可比较的同类建筑。
in the UK 限定比较范围。

sentences.sentence: Short contends that glass skyscrapers in London and around the world will become a liability over the next 20 or 30 years if climate modelling predictions and energy price rises come to pass as expected.
sentences.translation: Short 认为，如果气候模型预测和能源价格上涨如预期般成为现实，未来二三十年里，伦敦和世界各地的玻璃摩天楼将成为负担。

structure.text: Short contends
that glass skyscrapers in London and around the world will become a liability over the next 20 or 30 years
if climate modelling predictions and energy price rises come to pass as expected
come to pass as expected

difficult_points: that 引导 contends 的宾语从句，说明 Short 的判断。
will become a liability 表示这些建筑会从资产变成负担。
if 引导条件状语从句，说明判断成立的前提。
as expected 表示如预测那样发生。

sentences.sentence: He is convinced that sufficiently cooled skyscrapers using the natural environment can be produced in almost any climate.
sentences.translation: 他确信，利用自然环境实现充分冷却的摩天楼几乎可以在任何气候中建成。

structure.text: He is convinced
that sufficiently cooled skyscrapers using the natural environment can be produced in almost any climate
using the natural environment
can be produced in almost any climate

difficult_points: is convinced 表示强烈确信，后接 that 从句说明确信的内容。
using the natural environment 是现在分词短语，修饰 skyscrapers。
can be produced 使用被动语态，强调这种建筑可以被建成。
in almost any climate 强调适用范围广。

sentences.sentence: He and his team have worked on hybrid buildings in the harsh climates of Beijing and Chicago - built with natural ventilation assisted by back-up air conditioning - which, surprisingly perhaps, can be switched off more than half the time on milder days and during the spring and autumn.
sentences.translation: 他和团队已经在北京和芝加哥的严酷气候中研究过混合型建筑——这些建筑采用自然通风，并由备用空调辅助；令人有些惊讶的是，在较温和的日子以及春秋季，空调超过一半时间都可以关闭。

structure.text: He and his team
have worked on hybrid buildings in the harsh climates of Beijing and Chicago
built with natural ventilation assisted by back-up air conditioning
which, surprisingly perhaps, can be switched off more than half the time on milder days and during the spring and autumn
can be switched off more than half the time

difficult_points: have worked on 使用现在完成时，表示已有相关项目经验。
破折号中的 built with ... 修饰 hybrid buildings，说明建筑技术特征。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代 back-up air conditioning。
surprisingly perhaps 是插入语，表达作者对备用空调可频繁关闭的意外感。

sentences.sentence: Short looks at how we might reimagine the cities, offices and homes of the future.
sentences.translation: Short 探讨了我们可以如何重新设想未来的城市、办公室和住宅。

structure.text: Short
looks at
how we might reimagine the cities, offices and homes of the future
of the future

difficult_points: look at 在这里表示研究或探讨，而不是单纯“看”。
how we might reimagine ... 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 looks at 的宾语。
might 表示可能性和设想空间，语气比 will 更开放。

sentences.sentence: Maybe it's time we changed our outlook.
sentences.translation: 也许是时候改变我们的看法了。

structure.text: Maybe
it's time
we changed our outlook

difficult_points: it's time 后接过去式 changed，表示“该做某事了”，不是过去时间。
our outlook 指我们对建筑设计、能源使用和未来城市的整体看法。
Maybe 让结论语气更委婉，但仍明显提出改变观念的建议。
